mapper.sql: select r.id, r.reconciliation_no as reconciliationNo, r.channel_code as channelCode, r.bill_date as billDate, r.total_count as totalCount, r.total_amount as totalAmount, r.total_fee as totalFee, r.match_status as matchStatus, r.bill_file_id as billFileId, r.bill_file_name as billFileName, r.file_digest as fileDigest, r.importer_id as importerId, r.importer_name as importerName, r.import_time as importTime, r.reconcile_result as reconcileResult, r.created_at as createTime, r.updated_at as updateTime
mapper.select: select po.channel_trade_no as channelTradeNo, 'PAYMENT' as tradeType, po.amount as amount, 0 as fee, po.pay_time as tradeTime from payment_order po join payment_channel c on c.id = po.channel_id and c.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where po.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and c.channel_code = #{channelCode} and po.status = 'SUCCESS' and po.success_flag = 1 and po.channel_trade_no is not null and po.pay_time >= #{billDate} and po.pay_time < #{nextBillDate} union all select ro.channel_refund_no as channelTradeNo, 'REFUND' as tradeType, ro.refund_amount as amount, 0 as fee, ro.refund_time as tradeTime from payment_refund_order ro join payment_order po on po.id = ro.payment_order_id and po.tenant_id = ro.tenant_id join payment_channel c on c.id = po.channel_id and c.tenant_id = po.tenant_id where ro.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and c.channel_code = #{channelCode} and ro.status = 'SUCCESS' and ro.channel_refund_no is not null and ro.refund_time >= #{billDate} and ro.refund_time < #{nextBillDate} order by tradeTime asc, channelTradeNo asc
